title: plesioneuron regis
intro: Plesioneuron regis, also known as the 'King's Plesioneuron', is a rare and endangered plant species endemic to the Philippines. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Plesioneuron regis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of chronic diseases. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Plesioneuron regis are made by infusing its leaves in hot water, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application to soothe skin irritations.
